style.styleSentence: A high-energy late-90s futuristic R&B track at 108 BPM featuring bright FM synth leads, funky basslines, and bouncy New Jack swing drums that evoke a Sega Genesis aesthetic with crisp snares, arpeggiated game-like runs, and sparkling chord stabs.
style.vocalStyle: Smooth confident male R&B lead with catchy harmonies, flirty swagger, and danceable hip-hop cadence.
